body.title: Fix 23 classes missing IgorBase/AgentBase inheritance (audit punch list)
body.result: 23→0 classes missing inheritance. 7 actual fixups (Transport, MatterController, ConfabScanner, TraceMissAnalyzer, IgorMap, ScanForRestDrafter, InfrastructureBrief) + 6 transitive (5 transports, MockController) + audit refinements (stdlib Handler/Logger/Formatter exempt, EXEMPT_CLASS_NAMES for AgentBase/TimerHandle/PathManager, RackModule+Rack+Transport+MatterController in KNOWN_IGORBASE_ANCESTORS). 4119 tests pass.
body.description:
Audit (2026-04-29 logging audit) found 23 classes that don't inherit IgorBase/AgentBase. Per-class triage: (a) inherit IgorBase/AgentBase, (b) document exemption (e.g., AgentBase IS the base; logging_setup.TimerHandle/ConsoleHandler are infra primitives), (c) add to KNOWN_IGORBASE_ANCESTORS or similar exemption list.

List from lab/claudecode/reports/logging_audit_20260429-211639.md:
- lab/utility_closet/agent_base.py: AgentBase (definitionally exempt — document)
- lab/utility_closet/comms.py: Transport, CommsModule
- lab/utility_closet/db_shelf.py: DatabaseShelf
- lab/utility_closet/matter_shelf.py: MatterController, MockController, MatterShelf
- lab/utility_closet/transports/*.py: 5 Transport subclasses
- wild_igor/igor/logging_setup.py: TimerHandle, ConsoleHandler (likely exempt — they ARE the logging infra)
- wild_igor/igor/paths.py: PathManager (utility, may need IgorBase)
- lab/claudecode/engram_tools/*: ConfabScanner, TraceMissAnalyzer
- lab/claudecode/{map_igor,scan_for_rest_drafter,sprint_infrastructure_brief}.py
- lab/claudecode/archive/local_pool.py: 3 classes (gated by T-logging-archive-decision)

**Affected files:** ~17 files listed above.
**Design rules:** inherit-base-class palace rule (theigors/rules/inherit-base-class).
**Scope boundary:** in scope: classify each class (migrate/exempt) + apply. Out of scope: changing what those classes do.
**Test plan:** re-run audit_logging.py and audit_check_igorbase.py; confirm no regressions in tests/. Each class with new inheritance: verify __init__ super() chain works.
